CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jun-08-2011 Off Calendar

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Jan-26-2009 Assigned To Trial Court

SHORT CAUSE TRIAL
Off Calendar Jan-26-2009 Case Settled - Set For Crc 3.1385 Hrg On Jun-21-11 At 10:00 A.M. In Dept 610
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, having been assigned from the Presiding Judge Dept. 206 for Court Trial/Settlement Conference. Commissioner William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, Reporter: Lois Jones, CSR #3689.

Elizabeth McDonald, Esq. appeared for plaintiff Chase Bank USA, N.A., a corporation.
Defendant Paul D. Vivian was present in pro per, placed under oath and examined.
Notice of Time and Place of Trial was filed on October 22, 2008.
Doe defendants were dismissed today, January 26, 2009.

Terms of the Settlement Agreement were read into the record by Ms. McDonald. In accordance with the agreement of the parties, defendant Paul D. Vivian has an outstanding unpaid credit card balance owed to plaintiff Chase Bank USA, N.A., a corporation in the amount of $7,481.96. One thousand dollars shall be paid by defendant Paul D. Vivian to plaintiff on February 28, 2009. Furthermore, on the 28th day of each month thereafter, defendant Paul D. Vivian shall pay plaintiff Chase Bank USA, N.A., a corporation the sum of $230.00 until the balance is paid in full. If defendant complies with the terms of the agreement set forth above, plaintiff shall dismiss the complaint with prejudice.

If defendant Paul D. Vivian fails to make a monthly payment, he (defendant) shall have ten days to cure the default upon written notice from plaintiff. If defendant fails to comply after written notice, plaintiff Chase Bank USA, N.A., a corporation may, without further notice, obtain judgment against defendant in the amount of $10,227.27, with interest.

Defendant Paul D. Vivian was voir dired by the Court as to his understanding of the agreement. Ms. McDonald shall reduce the terms of this agreement to writing.

This matter is continued to June 21, 2011 @ 10:00 a.m. in Department 212 on the CRC 3.1385 Dismissal Calendar.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Oct-22-2008 Set For Trial On Jan-26-09 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 206
